creator: snelius@tsu.ru
text:
Hardware: HP bl460c G6.
bxe0@pci0:2:0:0:        class=0x020000 card=0x7058103c chip=0x165014e4 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Broadcom Corporation'
    device     = 'NetXtreme II BCM57711E 10-Gigabit PCIe'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet

Main symptom is a domains lookuping failed by timed out from any NS on fresh installed 9.0R system.

Fix: 

ifconfig bxe<#> -txcsum or -rxcsum
How-To-Repeat: Everytime present.
